description: Every `[ key-term ]` selector form (spec/grammar.md:111) parses cleanly: number `[1]`, bare identifier as a literal word key `[tom]`, `:name` read `[:who]`, word literal `["tom"]`, and parenthesized expression `[(:i + 1)]`, plus a mixed chain `:a.b[1].c` that interleaves a selector with dotted fields in source order (issue #79).
